title: Kali Yug, la dea della vendetta
writer: Leonardo Benvenuti, Mario Camerini, Piero De Bernardi
actors: Paul Guers, Senta Berger, Lex Barker
plot: At the end of the 19th century, during the British rule of India, the goddess Kali commits a number of murders, among which the man who was conducting a cargo of serum to a village infected with disease. Worried with the vast numb...
